route: Ship useful agent skills we can add to Solana AI Kit
value_signal: Open global Superteam bounty with 3,000 USDG total prizes and a 400/400/400/400/400/200/200/200/200/200 split across ten winners.
eligibility_or_region_notes: The public listing is Global and shows a live submit-now path; submission eligibility still depends on Superteam account rules and platform review.
deadline_or_currentness: Current public page is open; winner announcement is scheduled for July 08, 2026.
evidence_gate: Submitted entry plus platform acceptance or winner announcement and any later USDG payout evidence.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a no-spend agent-skill concept and short submission packet using public lead network patterns and public Solana AI Kit facts.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must sign in to Superteam and submit the best-fit package.
automation_boundary: No login, Superteam submission, Telegram outreach, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, or payment data.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The bounty is open, but no submission, acceptance, winner notice, or payout has been verified.
risk_flags: Platform submission required; contact path is Telegram rather than public email.
known_blockers: Submission depends on the human account owner; payout still depends on platform review.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after verified submission, payout, or usable value delivery.
